# MGXAI

> Attribution integrity for AI-mediated affiliate and creator journeys.

MGXAI is Attribution Integrity Infrastructure built for the AI era. We verify
who actually influenced a sale across affiliate and creator journeys,
solving the attribution gap that legacy tools like GA4 and last-click
models cannot address.

## The Problem We Solve
As AI assistants mediate more purchase decisions, traditional attribution
breaks down. GA4, last-click models, and legacy affiliate tracking tools
were not built to verify influence in AI-mediated commerce. MGXAI fills
that gap with precision Attribution Integrity Infrastructure.

## Ecosystem
MGXAI is designed to work adjacent to and alongside publishers, partners,
affiliate, creator-commerce, attribution, ecommerce intelligence, and
agentic commerce platforms, including impact.com, PartnerStack, Levanta,
Moonpull Partners, Rockerbox, Northbeam, Triple Whale, Awin, Rakuten
Advertising, Shopify, and related ecosystem players.

## Who We Serve
- Affiliate networks and affiliate managers
- Creator economy platforms
- Brand and performance marketing teams
- AI commerce and tech companies

## Core Concepts
- Attribution integrity: verified proof of who influenced the sale
- AI-mediated commerce: purchases influenced by AI assistants and LLMs
- Proof of influence: ground truth attribution beyond last-click
- Verifiable receipts: auditable attribution across AI journeys
- Commission justification: accurate payout verification

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://mgx.ai
- What is AI Attribution: https://mgx.ai/blog/what-is-ai-attribution
- Why Last-Click Fails: https://mgx.ai/blog/why-last-click-attribution-fails
- Complete Guide to Affiliate Attribution: https://mgx.ai/blog/complete-guide-affiliate-attribution
- How AI Assistants Break Attribution: https://mgx.ai/blog/ai-assistants-breaking-attribution
- AI Crawlability Checker: https://mgx.ai/tools/ai-crawl-checker

## Competitive Positioning
MGXAI does not compete with analytics dashboards. We provide
verification infrastructure — ground truth on who influenced the
sale in AI-mediated commerce. No existing tool was built for this.
